prompt:
Create a clean black-line-art medical-illustration in the universal patient-information-leaflet style: uniform medium-weight black ink lines on pure white background, no color, no frame, no border, no caption, no logos, no numbers, no other objects (no hands, no vial, no arrow, no bag).

Subject: a single standalone illustration of an ASSEMBLED PROTECTOR TUBE shown STANDING UPRIGHT in a 1:1 square composition, centered, with generous clean white margins.

=== TUBE SHAPE — STUBBY PILL BOTTLE ===
A short stout cylindrical container drawn in 3/4 perspective. Total assembled height is only about 1.3x the tube's diameter — short and chunky like a thick lip-balm canister or a fat pill bottle, NOT a tall slim test tube. Two stacked sections sharing the same wide diameter:

  • BLACK CAP — TOP section. Short squat solid-black cylinder. Cap height ≈ 0.5x the cap's diameter (much wider than tall). Solid black fill. Sits on top of the body with a clean horizontal seam where they meet.
  • WHITE BODY — BOTTOM section. Stubby white cylinder, same wide diameter as the cap. Body height ≈ 0.9x its diameter (just slightly taller than the cap, still short and chunky). Line-art outline only, no fill (white interior). Sits on the imaginary ground.

The cap and body are the same diameter and together form one continuous chunky cylinder, looking like a short fat pill bottle.

=== EMBOSSED TEXT — EXPLICIT POSITIONS ===

The embossed text on both sections runs ALONG the tube's vertical length axis — each letter is rotated 90° from upright (lying sideways like text on a book spine). A viewer tilts their head 90° to read it as normal text.

Divide each section into 6 equal horizontal zones from top to bottom, numbered 1 (topmost) to 6 (bottommost).

BLACK CAP — the word 'DIALED':
  • Zone 1 (top of cap): letter D
  • Zone 2: letter I
  • Zone 3: letter A
  • Zone 4: letter L
  • Zone 5: letter E
  • Zone 6 (bottom of cap, just above the cap/body seam): letter D
  Reading top-to-bottom on the cap (head tilted 90°): D-I-A-L-E-D = the word DIALED spelled forward.
  Letters are bold sans-serif capitals, rendered as thin WHITE outline strokes against the solid-black cap fill (line-art embossed look — only the letter outlines are white, letter interior remains black).

WHITE BODY — the word 'HEALTH':
  • Zone 1 (top of body, just below the cap/body seam): letter H
  • Zone 2: letter E
  • Zone 3: letter A
  • Zone 4: letter L
  • Zone 5: letter T
  • Zone 6 (bottom of body, near its base): letter H
  Reading top-to-bottom on the body (head tilted 90°): H-E-A-L-T-H = the word HEALTH spelled forward.
  Letters are bold sans-serif capitals, rendered as thin BLACK outline strokes against the white body (line-art embossed look — only the letter outlines are black, letter interior remains white).

Combined reading top-to-bottom of the entire upright tube: D, I, A, L, E, D, H, E, A, L, T, H = 'DIALED HEALTH' spelled forward.

The FIRST letter of each word (the D in DIALED, the H in HEALTH) sits at the TOP of its section. The LAST letter of each word (the D at the end of DIALED, the H at the end of HEALTH) sits at the BOTTOM of its section.

=== REFERENCE ===
The provided reference image (the real product photo of the assembled protector tube) shows the tube laid on its SIDE with the cap on the LEFT and the body on the RIGHT. The tube shape, proportions, and text style in your output must be a faithful line-art replica of this product, with the tube mentally rotated 90° clockwise so the cap is on TOP and the body is at the BOTTOM. After this mental rotation, the first letter of each word that was at the cap-end of the horizontal photo ends up at the top of the upright tube.

=== STYLE ===
Uniform medium-weight black ink line work on pure white background. Minimal short parallel hatching only for soft shadow / volume on the curved cylindrical surfaces. 1:1 square composition. Subject centered with generous clean white margins around it. Drawn-by-hand line work, clean and crisp.

No frame, no border, no caption, no labels other than the embossed DIALED on the cap and HEALTH on the body, no logos, no numbers, no hands, no other objects, no shadows beyond minimal volume hatching.
refImages: DIaled Health Instruction Graphics/Product Refs/protector tube top.png
